name: 03 — Site Generation (Claude Sonnet)

parameters.body: ={{ JSON.stringify({ lead_id: $json.lead_id, step: 'site_generating', message: 'Designing your site...' }) }}
={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'claude-sonnet-4-5', max_tokens: 8192, system: $json.system_prompt, messages: [{ role: 'user', content: $json.user_message }] }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ lead_id: $json.lead_id, slug: $json.slug, niche: $json.niche, template_category: $json.category, site_props: $json.site_props, status: 'deploying', generation_ms: $json.generation_ms }) }}
={{ JSON.stringify({ lead_id: $('Parse and Validate SiteProps').first().json.lead_id, step: 'site_generated', message: 'Your site content is ready. Deploying...' }) }}

data.jsonData: ={{ JSON.stringify({ lead_id: $('Parse and Validate SiteProps').first().json.lead_id, slug: $('Parse and Validate SiteProps').first().json.slug, site_id: (Array.isArray($('Insert Site Row').first().json) ? $('Insert Site Row').first().json[0].site_id : $('Insert Site Row').first().json.site_id), site_props: $('Parse and Validate SiteProps').first().json.site_props, niche: $('Parse and Validate SiteProps').first().json.niche, category: $('Parse and Validate SiteProps').first().json.category }) }}

notes: Calls Claude Sonnet 4.5 (update model string if upgrading) with a niche-specific system prompt. Parses and validates the SiteProps JSON blob, inserts a sites row, then fires workflow 04. The system prompt is embedded in the Build Claude Prompt code node — update it if the SiteProps schema changes. Timeout is 120s; Claude typically responds in 15-35s.
